properties.entry: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM JDBC_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = ?
SELECT MEMBER_ID , MEMBER_NAME FROM JDBC_MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = ? AND MEMBER_PWD = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LOGIN_CHECK WHERE MEMBER_ID = ?
INSERT INTO JDBC_BOARD ( BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , BOARD_WRITER ) VALUES ( ? , ? , ? )
SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , MEMBER_NAME FROM JDBC_BOARD JOIN JDBC_MEMBER ON(MEMBER_ID = BOARD_WRITER) ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , MEMBER_NAME FROM JDBC_BOARD JOIN JDBC_MEMBER ON (MEMBER_ID = BOARD_WRITER) WHERE BOARD_NO = ?
